## Summary

Adds `mistakeProofText()` — a centralized pre-render quality gate that ALL author-facing text passes through before display in any format. Catches truncated sentences, extra whitespace, machine-residue tokens, orphaned punctuation, and CMOS violations.

Previously, only *some* text paths applied truncation checks (`blockTruncation: true`). Now the full quality gate is applied consistently to every render path.

## Scope

**Touches:**
- `lib/evaluation/reportRenderSafety.ts` — new `mistakeProofText()` function
- `lib/evaluation/reportCriterionDisplay.ts` — criterion rationales now mistake-proofed
- `app/evaluate/[jobId]/page.tsx` — pitches, premise, strengths, risks, recs, summary
- `app/reports/[jobId]/page.tsx` — summary, premise
- `app/api/reports/[jobId]/download/route.ts` — `cleanReportText()` → full quality gate
- `components/evaluation/CriterionOpportunities.tsx` — symptom, cause, fix, reader effect, mistake-proofing fields
- `components/revision/ReviseQueueV2Client.tsx` — 6-part diagnostic + A/B/C candidates
- `components/revision/ReviseWorkbenchClient.tsx` — diagnostic fields + candidate text

**Does NOT touch:**
- Evaluation pipeline / scoring logic
- Database schema
- Download format structure (only text quality)

## Branch Freshness (Never Behind)

Branch-Behind-Base: 0

## Risks & Anomalies

- `mistakeProofText()` repairs truncated endings by cutting to last complete sentence. If a legitimate text intentionally ends mid-phrase (e.g., ellipsis-style ending), the gate may append `…`. Mitigated: only fires when text lacks terminal punctuation AND exceeds 30% threshold.
- All render paths now apply more aggressive text cleanup. If LLM output was previously rendered with its raw quirks (double spaces, machine tokens), users will notice improved quality immediately.

---

No-Pipeline-Impact: Confirmed — no evaluation generation or scoring logic changes. Pure rendering/display quality improvement.
